criteria.name: Cleaning Config
criteria.evidence: docs/cleaning-config.json exists with all required sections (value_ranges, fwi_output_ranges, cross_variable_checks, rate_of_change, flatline, enforcement). Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: enforce_quality() Function
criteria.evidence: quality.py implements enforce_quality() with config-driven enforcement actions. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Pipeline Integration
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py inserts enforce_quality() after resample, before impute. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: FWI Output Enforcement
criteria.evidence: cleaning.py calls enforce_fwi_outputs() after calculate_fwi(). Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Quality Enforcement Report
criteria.evidence: quality_enforcement_report.csv is generated and registered in manifest. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Manifest Registration
criteria.evidence: Quality enforcement report registered in pipeline_manifest.json. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Quality Flags Column
criteria.evidence: _quality_flags column added by enforce_quality(). Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: QA/QC Report Enhancement
criteria.evidence: Ralph added quality_enforced_count, quality_flagged_count, out_of_range_pre_enforcement, out_of_range_post_enforcement columns to generate_qa_qc_report(). Function now accepts optional quality_actions parameter. cleaning.py passes all_quality_actions. All 9 QA/QC tests pass.

criteria.name: Date Range Truncation
criteria.evidence: truncate_date_range() filters records before 2023-04-01. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Fast Test Suite Passes
criteria.evidence: 4 test failures in tests/test_quality_enforcement.py — all Martin test-design bugs, not production code issues: (1) test_clean_data_passes_through_unchanged: sample_hourly fixture uses 24 identical values for all 3 flatline-monitored variables, triggering flatline detection; (2) test_flatline_does_not_modify_values: wind_speed_kmh list has 15 elements vs 8-row DataFrame (ValueError); (3) test_flatline_action_is_flagged: asserts action=='flagged' but config-driven action is 'flag_only'; (4) test_flatline_with_nan_gap: NaN gap only in temperature but RH and wind have 7 identical values each, exceeding threshold. Martin needs to fix these test fixtures.

criteria.name: No Out-of-Range FWI Inputs
criteria.evidence: enforce_quality() runs before impute, setting out-of-range values to NaN. Verified by prior review.

criteria.name: Flatline Detection
criteria.evidence: Flatline detection uses config-driven flag_only action. Does not modify values. Verified by prior review.

failing_nodes.message: Martin test-design bug: sample_hourly fixture uses 24 identical values for air_temperature_c, relative_humidity_pct, and wind_speed_kmh. Flatline threshold is 6 hours, so all 3 variables trigger flatline. Fixture needs variation in at least some values so clean data passes through unchanged.
Martin test-design bug: wind_speed_kmh list has 15 elements but DataFrame has 8 rows (periods=8). Causes ValueError: All arrays must be of the same length.
Martin test-design bug: test asserts action=='flagged' but the config-driven flatline action is 'flag_only'. Test needs to assert 'flag_only' to match config.

Martin test-design bug: test_flatline_with_nan_gap puts NaN gap only in air_temperature_c (3+NaN+3=7, below threshold 6) but relative_humidity_pct and wind_speed_kmh have 7 identical values each, exceeding threshold. All 3 flatline variables need the NaN gap.

summary: Ralph fixed AC-DQ-8: generate_qa_qc_report() now outputs quality_enforced_count, quality_flagged_count, out_of_range_pre_enforcement, and out_of_range_post_enforcement columns, with all_quality_actions passed from cleaning.py. All 9 QA/QC tests pass. 11 of 12 criteria now PASS. AC-DQ-10 still FAILs due to 4 Martin test-design bugs in tests/test_quality_enforcement.py — these are broken test fixtures/assertions, not production code issues. Martin needs to fix: (1) sample_hourly fixture constant values triggering flatline, (2) wrong list length in flatline test, (3) wrong action string assertion, (4) incomplete NaN gap across flatline variables.
